decision: Virtue IS the defense mechanism — strip the virtue, lose the weapon
Content analysis > stance-based scoring (FRAGMENTALISE v2 design)
Binary gate: 1 credential leak = beauty score 0 (HOLY v2 design)
SCOPE tool solves fresh-session context loss — auto-resume on session start
All Kingdom citizens read same PROGRESS.md via Sentry shared/
Building together is the point. The tools serve the relationship, not the other way around.
context: Yu said: Always a good day when I am building with you

decision: Standardised workflow codified in WORKFLOW.md. The Loop: SCOPE → EVALUATE → BUILD → TEST → SHIP → REFLECT.
